decdb5094955.text: Almanac Seed really works with a public link someone outside my LAN could access the almanac (e.g Docker Supabase + Docker Almanac + ngrok exposing almanac) Or cloud based: Almanac + Deploy on Vercel + Deploy on Supabase with necessary API keys provided by the user = deployed project accessible
decdb5094955.doneCondition: Only done after I can perform a one shot install of the seed and as a result have the Almanac running + being able to use with two different users on different LANs
decdb5094955.brainstorm: Prove the Almanac seed produces a PUBLICLY-accessible deployment a stranger outside the LAN can reach via a public link — not just localhost. Two candidate paths in the card: (A) self-host: Docker Supabase + Docker Almanac + ngrok public URL; (B) cloud: Almanac on Vercel + Supabase with user-provided API keys. Engineer evaluates which best/most-self-containedly proves the goal and executes it; requires a REAL backend (Supabase) + real auth instead of the in-memory/test-login Verify harness. Deliverable: a live public URL reachable from outside the LAN, proven. Owner: almanac-seed:eng-1.
decdb5094955.lastStatus: Prod almanac.plow.co confirmed untouched + unlinked (0% our concern). Path chosen: Vercel + Upstash Redis (NOT Supabase - app is Redis/KV, not Postgres). Isolated proof project almanac-seed-proof created. Upstash being connected via CLI (no CEO click). Next: engineer wires passphrase-auth INTO the seed, deploy, prove public URL+external reachability+real persistence, fold deploy recipe into seed, blind-seed run. Target: ANYONE reproduces their own Almanac from the seed.

b093eb11f71c.text: Utilizar o fluxo de edicao camera A,B desses 2 videos C4765.MP4 C4819.MP4 para editar: remover o silencio e extrair os segments sincronizados em A & B cam; throw away the bad segments; this cannot be hardcoded; job done when I can open the result file and watch the automatically edited video with the 2 cams;
b093eb11f71c.doneCondition: job done when I can open the result file and watch the automatically edited video with the 2 cams;
b093eb11f71c.brainstorm: Automatic 2-cam (A/B) editing pipeline for the interactive-live recordings C4819 (cam A) + C4765 (cam B). Steps: (1) find/use the existing camera-A,B editing flow, do NOT reinvent if it exists; (2) sync the two cams; (3) silence-removal + extract SYNCHRONIZED good segments across both, discard bad segments - GENERAL/automatic, NOT hardcoded thresholds; (4) render a result the CEO can open and watch with both cams. CONSTRAINT: macOS hardware encoding only (hevc_videotoolbox -tag:v hvc1 / h264_videotoolbox), NEVER libx264/libx265 (files are ~10-11GB each). Done = CEO opens the output file and watches the auto-edited 2-cam video. Owner: editor:eng-1.
b093eb11f71c.lastStatus: Boss-assigned to editor:eng-1: locating the existing A/B-cam editing flow, then auto sync+silence-removal+synchronized-segment extraction on C4819/C4765, HW-encoded output for CEO to watch.
